title: danthonia lanata
intro: Danthonia lanata, also known as hair grass or feather grass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Danthonia lanata include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, applied topically as poultices, or used as inhalants to harness its medicinal properties.
